---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "ishika-ravat"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

## Named Storms Per Year

Below is a plot showing the number of named storms per year in the `dplyr::storms` dataset.

```{r plot-storms}
storms %>%
  distinct(name, year) %>%
  count(year) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkblue", size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Named Storms Per Year",
    subtitle = "Based on the dplyr::storms dataset",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Named Storms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```
